ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-22-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appeared for the plaintiff.
The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jun-30-2026 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)
